pet_notes: Nagasaki Soyo simplified into a compact Codex digital pet: chibi teen girl, long muted reddish brown hair with soft side strands, blue eyes, gentle composed expression, navy sailor-style school dress from the large main figure, white collar and cuffs, lavender neck ribbon, small gold shield badge, pleated navy skirt with two white hem stripes, black knee-high socks, brown loafers. Clothing must follow the large main reference, not the lower-right stage costume.
style_notes: Pixel-art-adjacent Codex pet, compact chibi proportions, thick 1-2 px dark outline, stepped pixel edges, flat cel shading, limited palette, crisp removable chroma-key background, no text, no shadows, no scenery, no soft gradients.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
